title: Better Creepers
description: Adding 16 new Creeper variants for different biomes!
body: ## Better Creepers Introducing the Better Creepers Datapack, an exciting addition to your Minecraft World. This unique datapack adds 16 new biome and Block variants for creepers, bringing a fresh twist to encounters with these explosive creatures. ### New Creepers Spawning Rate of New Creepers is 1 for every 4 creepers. Variants Are: Grass, Stone, Deepslate, Lush Caves, Gravel and Many More! New Creepers Blend with blocks and biome around them, retaining terrifying alpha experience of creeper's camouflaging like good old days. They also have less health compare to normal creepers. becarful while exploring world because one of these creatures with surely surprise you! - **Commands:** Better Creepers Spawn Egg `function animated_java:better_creepers/mech/give_spawnegg` - **BisectHosting Is Minecraft Server Hosting That Proves Players With an Easy and Affordable Way to Hoster their Minecraft Server! Get 25% Off For your First Month By Using My Code!** ![Grass Varient](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/826929090123530261/1148582767899181086/2023-09-04_20.11.28.png) ![Stone Varient](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/826929090123530261/1148582768163442778/2023-09-04_20.13.35.png) ![Dripstone Varient](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/826929090123530261/1148582768415084586/2023-09-04_20.14.58.png) ![Deepslate Varient](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/826929090123530261/1148582768759013436/2023-09-04_20.16.39.png) ![Podzol Varient](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/826929090123530261/1148582769027453079/2023-09-05_13.11.44.png) ![Sand Varient](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/826929090123530261/1148582769342021692/2023-09-05_13.13.27.png) ![Red Sand Varient](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/826929090123530261/1148582769660809277/2023-09-05_13.14.45.png) ![Terracotta Variant ](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/826929090123530261/1148582770038280192/2023-09-05_13.16.23.png)
